system.description: Fires half-strength (round up) Narcoject/toxin rounds as a hold-out pistol with one-half range (round down). One shot per reload. Reloading takes 10 Combat Turns. Rounds cost four times the normal price. Firing requires a Special Skill or Quickness Test. Cannot be linked to any kind of aim enhancer. See p. 62, Street Samurai Catalog, for Narcoject weapons; p. 186, SRII, for toxins; and pp. 90, 92, 97, Shadowtech, for other compounds. After firing, a character must apply a +2 modifier to all visual tests for a period of (4 - Unaugmented Body) Combat Turns, for a minimum of 1 Combat Turn, For rules on the maximum capacity of the orbital socket, see Cyberware Rules, p. 45.
